title: Hold My Fresh Fixed Doors
description: Fixes door and trapdoor texture rotation inconsistencies revealed by animation mods
body:
# Simply Fixed Doors

A resource pack that fixes rotation texture inconsistencies on doors and trapdoors.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XB2wW2wL/images/e5e864238a7ebb468e2c945dc9b0fae2d108cecf.gif)
> Animations from the [Fancy Door Animations](https://modrinth.com/project/gQIpdGQl) mod

## What it fixes

Vanilla Minecraft has subtle texture rotation inconsistencies on doors and trapdoors. Sides and edges where the UV mapping doesn't stay consistent across different block states and orientations. These issues are nearly invisible in normal gameplay, but become noticeable when using animation mods like [Fancy Door Animations](https://modrinth.com/project/gQIpdGQl), where the transition between states reveals mismatched textures.

This pack corrects the UV mapping across **all vanilla door and trapdoor types** so that textures remain consistent regardless of placement, orientation, or open/close state.

> Fence gate support is coming soon.

## Compatibility

- Works standalone, no mods required
- Designed as a companion for [Fancy Door Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancy-door-animations), fixing the texture artifacts visible during animations
- Compatible with any resource pack that doesn't override door/trapdoor models
- Covers all 21 trapdoor types and all door types
